Get to know me
The Player

Hey, I'm Aryan Kumar Singh — a Foundation level student from the 25F3 batch, pursuing Data Science Standalone at IIT Madras BS. I'm contesting for Deputy Secretary of SPORTIFY as an independent candidate.

I've been part of SPORTIFY's Events & Operations department since I joined this degree. I know how things work inside this society — and I know what we can do better.

Two terms in, already delivered. Now let's scale it.
